title: Caesar Saves the Country Against His Will
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on caesar saves the country against his will within the The Curly Hat Pirates Arrive storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: to think that a monster like that...

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Is Kaidou's errand boy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's crazy, huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Fortunately, Jack was equally unsuccessful in defeating either of us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I guess you could say that our steadfastness caused his patience to run out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: On the fifth day,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He brought out his weapon.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: That poison gas weapon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It was all over in the blink of an eye.

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: The "slaughter gas" spread across the country with all the speed of an explosion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Who could hope to avoid some- thing like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: The gas swallowed up the entire town and half the forest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We were completely trapped...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Totally done in, save those who had taken refuge deep within the fortress.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And as for what came next...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: truth be told, I don't want to remember.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Answer us!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Where is the war- Rior from the Wano Country?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: N- Not here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Guaaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Gyaha Haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: repeating a question whose answer they had by that point surely learnt by heart,

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Jack's men went around destroying our country and staying our warriors.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Where is the war- Rior from the wano country?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We don't know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Uuuugh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The partial- Larry strong ones were crucified...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: and tortured.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I don't know!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Why would we harbor a Wano Warrior anyway!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I beg of you... stop this. Not a single person in this coun- try... has the knowledge you seek.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Does it please you... to cause death for so little benefit? Your actions are beyond mercless!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: I won't forget that face of yours, Jack. Even when I'm no longer of this world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This cat's malice will follow you till the day it causes you to death!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The grue- some spectacle continued for almost a full day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: On the sixth day... perhaps their appetite for destruction had been sated,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: or they had grown tired of hearing the same answer again and again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: On the sixth day, leaving behind only a few underlings,

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Jack left this island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How horrible !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I can't believe you all had absolutely no help that whole time...

summary: Caesar Saves the Country Against His Will: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
